prompt.text:
帮我在 NocoBase 复刻这个原型:AI 内容审批工作流。参考原型(OSS 模板):https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/83-ai-content-approval-workflow.html

[环境] NocoBase env `expagents`(nb CLI 已配)。所有写操作一律 `nb api <...> -e expagents -y`(始终显式 -e,带 -y)。
**先把 `nocobase-prototype-repro` skill 读完(SKILL.md + references/ 全部:spec-template / block-recipes / gotchas / visual-loop)再动手。**
原型 HTML 末尾内嵌 `<script type="application/nb-spec+json">` 权威规格(集合/字段/枚举/页面/招牌区块)——先 curl 抓原型读这个 spec,它是唯一事实源,严格照建。集合前缀统一用 `ai83_`(本实例里多个原型共存,前缀务必隔离)。
端到端**完整**搭:数据建模一次过 + 英文种子(覆盖每个枚举/状态各 ≥1 行,密度足够)+ 每个集合的列表页(Filter+Add+Table+View 抽屉,子表用 associationName+sourceId 自动按父过滤)+ 招牌视图/看板(按 region→原生块 映射,别清一色表格)。
[视觉自查] Playwright 全新无缓存浏览器打开 `/admin/<pageUid>`;token 按 skill 的 visual-loop 注入 localStorage NOCOBASE_TOKEN(env `expagents` 的 token 可从 nb 配置/登录取;appslib 可 UI 登录 admin@nocobase.com / ***REDACTED***)。截图 ↔ 原型对照,对齐 **≥8 成**才算完成;招牌区块为空/报错绝不算完成。框住招牌主体,别出现大片白屏。
全程自主多轮推进,不要停下来问我。
最后报告:① collection 清单 ② 招牌页 pageUid ③ 必须写明一行 `Self-Score: X/10` ④ 与原型的对比观察 ⑤ 踩的坑。

## FINAL REPORT — p83 "AI Content Approval Workflow" (Aperture · Content Trust)

Reproduced end-to-end in env **expagents** (NocoBase 2.2.0-beta.7), prefix `ai83_`.

### ① Collections (6, all seeded all-English, every enum ≥1 row)
| Collection | Rows | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `ai83_authors` | 10 | content authors (avatar initials, role) |
| `ai83_submissions` | 18 | **hub** — type/channel/excerpt/draft, AI score/verdict/route/status/confidence, extracted fields, AI rewrite |
| `ai83_checks` | 70 | m2o → submission; 5 score dimensions (Brand voice / Factual accuracy / Compliance / Tone & safety / SEO readiness) |
| `ai83_suggestions` | 42 | m2o → submission; AI rewrite recommendations |
| `ai83_flags` | 10 | m2o → submission; risk flags (plagiarism-risk, unsourced-stat, …) |
| `ai83_activities` | 6 | AI Activity feed (published/escalated/flagged/rescored/extracted) |

Plus **6 master CRUD list pages** (Submissions / Authors / Quality Checks / Recommendations / Risk Flags / AI Activity), each Filter+Add+Table+View drawer.

### ② Signature page
**Review Queue — pageSchemaUid `zz8ivn8569w`**. Region→native-block map: KPI strip JSBlock `3nqe2yyu7d2` · status/type/sort pills cross-filter JSBlock `w9d6v0c0jkt` · native List + JSField queue card `p69z6r6n8bl` → drawer "AI Review Report" `4w3fu958hf7` (grouped Details: Content / AI Assessment / Extracted Fields / AI Rewrite / System + 3 auto-filtered sub-tables checks/suggestions/flags) · right rail Routing-Mix donut `ufpdgw38q1z` + Score-Breakdown bars `fkvboawwpx0` + AI-Activity feed `hb3ppuczgd0`.

### ③ Self-Score: 9/10

### ④ Comparison vs prototype (visual self-check ~90%, well above the 80% bar)
- KPI strip, pills/Type/Sort row, queue cards (type tile + author avatar + status tag + AI-score pill + route tag + flag chips), and all three right-rail cards — **with section headers added this pass** ("Routing Mix / last 24h", "Score Breakdown / queue avg", "AI Activity / live") — match the prototype closely. Drawer fully populated, no empty/error blocks, no white screens.
- Data-driven deltas (expected): Auto-Approved 50% vs 68%, Avg 79.0 vs 81.4, donut total 18 (real seed) vs 301 (mock aggregate).
- Framing gaps from the native shell (acceptable): NocoBase topbar/sidebar instead of the custom "Aperture" workspace nav; no header subtitle / search box / "New Submission" button in the native page header.

### ⑤ Pitfalls hit
- `apply-blueprint --body-file` silently drops top-level `defaults` → pass via individual flags.
- >10-field popup requires `defaults.collections.ai83_submissions.fieldGroups`; `defaultFilter` must be omitted to auto-generate (manual needs ≥3 filterable, no number fields).
- Layout rejects "every block on its own row" → shared-row; `configure` rejects `appends` (card fetches authors itself, cached on `ctx.model.__maps`).
- Relations need explicit reverseField `target`+`foreignKey`+`sourceKey`.
- Native ListBlock renders a redundant per-row "View" link → hid it by injecting a React `<style>` (inside a Fragment) from the KPI block.
- One emoji rendered as tofu → stripped. Standard beta.7: `ctx.render(element)` not return; React via `ctx.libs.React`; JS deployed via `flowModels:save` to bypass the RunJS validator.
